import { Component, OnInit, Input } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-closing-deals', templateUrl: './closing-deals.component.html', styleUrls: ['./closing-deals.component.scss'] }) /** * Closing Deals Component */ export class ClosingDealsComponent implements OnInit { // Closing Deals @Input() ClosingDeals: Array<{ name?: string; profile?: string; userName?: string; amount?: string; date?: string; }> | undefined; constructor() { } ngOnInit(): void { } }
